name: Bourbon-Pecan Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, pumpkin, 3/4 cup sugar, half-and-half, 3 tablespoons bourbon, cinnamon, ginger, and salt in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
3. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake an additional 45 minutes or until set. Set aside to cool.
5. In a saucepan, combine butter and 1/4 cup brown sugar. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
6. Add pecans and 2 tablespoons bourbon, stirring to coat the nuts.
7. Pour the nut mixture over the cooled pie.
8. Heat the remaining bourbon in a saucepan just long enough to produce fumes (do not boil). Turn off the heat, ignite the bourbon if desired, and pour over the pie.
9. Serve when flames die down.
